summary: Add unwrapResultsArray, unwrapSingleEnvelope, printQuiet, printPlain helpers; route --csv/--quiet/--plain above the piped JSON gate; unwrap envelopes before --select/--compact.
reason: The generated gate `flags.asJSON || !isTerminal()` short-circuited explicit format flags when stdout was piped (the agent / shell case). printOutputWithFlags also fed CSV/plain renderers an envelope-shaped JSON instead of a flat array. --quiet was silent despite docs saying 'one value per line'. --plain had no renderer at all.
validated_outcome: videos list --csv --select id,name | head -3 emits CSV header + 2 rows; videos list --quiet --select id emits one ID per line; videos list --plain --select id,views emits tab-separated rows; videos/playlists/clips get --select id,name returns the populated {id,name} object.
